description: Case style: Stainless steel round case for enhanced durability, double ring, blue crystal encrusted, fixed bezel for styleDial Style: White, glazed dial with metallic hands, branding at the 12 and 6 hour mark, graphic printStrap Style: Blue, genuine textured leather strap with tang clasp closure, holes and loops to offer a snug fitFeatures: Screw to reset time, water resistantWarranty: 2 YearsWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
